channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed

item.title: After a months-long occupation, Minnesota is still recoverin…
item.author: Governor Tim Walz (@governorwalz.mn.gov)
item.description:
After a months-long occupation, Minnesota is still recovering from a retribution campaign waged by the federal government.

Now, Minnesota stands with Houston in demanding accountability for the fatal shooting of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo. This bloodshed cannot be normalized.
item.content:encoded:
After a months-long occupation, Minnesota is still recovering from a retribution campaign waged by the federal government.

Now, Minnesota stands with Houston in demanding accountability for the fatal shooting of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo. This bloodshed cannot be normalized.

item.title: Kids today have lost the fine art of bullshitting a 10 page …
item.author: Amy Mode Activated 🪷 ᓚᘏᗢ ಇ. (@activateamymode.bsky.social)
item.description: Kids today have lost the fine art of bullshitting a 10 page paper from a single Funk & Wagnalls entry or from reading only the CliffsNotes. 🤣
item.content:encoded: Kids today have lost the fine art of bullshitting a 10 page paper from a single Funk & Wagnalls entry or from reading only the CliffsNotes. 🤣

item.title: Football has a way of turning ordinary places into gathering…
item.author: Mayor Zohran Kwame Mamdani (@mayor.nyc.gov)
item.description: Football has a way of turning ordinary places into gathering spaces. These are the small businesses — and the people — who helped New Yorkers experience the World Cup together.
item.content:encoded: Football has a way of turning ordinary places into gathering spaces. These are the small businesses — and the people — who helped New Yorkers experience the World Cup together.

item.title: England manager Thomas Tuchel faces serious consequences if …

item.description: England manager Thomas Tuchel faces serious consequences if his team can't defeat Norway in the World Cup quarterfinals.

item.title: Poor Roxy got attacked by someone’s asshole dog. Came chargi…
item.author: Stoned Yeti 👽 (@stonedmcyeti.bsky.social)
item.description:
Poor Roxy got attacked by someone’s asshole dog. Came charging at us, but Roxy got in between myself and the other dog, and fucked it up. She is and will
Always be a good girl. 🐶
item.content:encoded:
Poor Roxy got attacked by someone’s asshole dog. Came charging at us, but Roxy got in between myself and the other dog, and fucked it up. She is and will
Always be a good girl. 🐶

item.title: He woke up before sunrise, just like he did every workday. H…
item.author: Alt National Park Service (@altnps.bsky.social)
item.description: He woke up before sunrise, just like he did every workday. His wife made him breakfast. He kissed her goodbye, grabbed his lunch and work boots, patted his dog, and climbed into the white van he used to take his construction crew to work.
item.content:encoded: He woke up before sunrise, just like he did every workday. His wife made him breakfast. He kissed her goodbye, grabbed his lunch and work boots, patted his dog, and climbed into the white van he used to take his construction crew to work.

item.title: Delta Air Lines is betting that even travelers who want luxu…
item.author: The Wall Street Journal (@wsj.com)
item.description: Delta Air Lines is betting that even travelers who want luxuries like lie-flat seats and chef-curated meals are willing to make some trade-offs for a cheaper ticket. 🔗 on.wsj.com/4fsoD5o
item.content:encoded: Delta Air Lines is betting that even travelers who want luxuries like lie-flat seats and chef-curated meals are willing to make some trade-offs for a cheaper ticket. 🔗 on.wsj.com/4fsoD5o

item.title: A new study of people 80 and older with exceptional gaits fi…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A new study of people 80 and older with exceptional gaits finds fast walkers have about a 50% lower risk of cognitive decline, showing the connection between physical health and brain health.
item.content:encoded: A new study of people 80 and older with exceptional gaits finds fast walkers have about a 50% lower risk of cognitive decline, showing the connection between physical health and brain health.

item.title: Admired for its regal blue lace-like crest and mesmerizing …
item.author: Eloise Powers (@elnopower.bsky.social)
item.description:
Admired for its regal blue lace-like crest and mesmerizing red eyes.

The Victoria Crowned Pigeon, native to New Guinea, is the world's largest living pigeon. Its graceful beauty and deep calls make it one of the region's most remarkable birds.
Scientific Name
Goura victoria

📷 B. Sharma
item.content:encoded:
Admired for its regal blue lace-like crest and mesmerizing red eyes.

The Victoria Crowned Pigeon, native to New Guinea, is the world's largest living pigeon. Its graceful beauty and deep calls make it one of the region's most remarkable birds.
Scientific Name
Goura victoria

📷 B. Sharma

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム 新宿解消録テンチョウ みいちゃんと山田さん外伝 | 【第1夜】すきに焼きたい夜もある / マガポケ…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
新宿解消録テンチョウ　みいちゃんと山田さん外伝 | 【第1夜】すきに焼きたい夜もある / マガポケ | 少年マガジン公式無料漫画アプリ

新宿解消録テンチョウ　みいちゃんと山田さん外伝漫画/船津紳平 原案/亜月ねねUP次回更新は7/19(日曜)予定です。 無料話更新：毎週日曜 最新話更新：毎週日曜 新宿は歌舞伎町のキャバクラ「Ephemere」。そこで店長を務める男‥‥通称・テンチョウ。日々、降りかかる売上のプレッシャーや理不尽な客、トラブル続出のキャバ...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
新宿解消録テンチョウ　みいちゃんと山田さん外伝 | 【第1夜】すきに焼きたい夜もある / マガポケ | 少年マガジン公式無料漫画アプリ

新宿解消録テンチョウ　みいちゃんと山田さん外伝漫画/船津紳平 原案/亜月ねねUP次回更新は7/19(日曜)予定です。 無料話更新：毎週日曜 最新話更新：毎週日曜 新宿は歌舞伎町のキャバクラ「Ephemere」。そこで店長を務める男‥‥通称・テンチョウ。日々、降りかかる売上のプレッシャーや理不尽な客、トラブル続出のキャバ...

item.title: You're going to get left behind if you don't use Al." Leave…
item.author: Jon of The North (@krauza.bsky.social)
item.description:
You're going to get left behind if you don't use Al."

Leave me then. Leave me with my critical thinking skills, my ability to read and write long- form, and books without needing Al summaries.
item.content:encoded:
You're going to get left behind if you don't use Al."

Leave me then. Leave me with my critical thinking skills, my ability to read and write long- form, and books without needing Al summaries.

item.title: 🔥 Hot Repo！ 🔥 (100+ new stars) 📦 home-assistant / core ⭐…

item.description:

🏡 Open source home automation that puts local control and privacy first.
item.content:encoded:
🔥 Hot Repo！ 🔥 (100+ new stars)

📦 home-assistant / core
⭐ 88,456 (+125)
🗒 Python

🏡 Open source home automation that puts local control and privacy first.

item.title: Egypt fans being pulled aside, patted down, and double-check…
item.author: Raider (@iwillnotbesilenced.bsky.social)
item.description:
Egypt fans being pulled aside, patted down, and double-checked before the Argentina vs.
Egypt match, while Argentina supporters were allowed to walk through security without the same level of screening. And this is exactly why people keep accusing FIFA of double standards.
item.content:encoded:
Egypt fans being pulled aside, patted down, and double-checked before the Argentina vs.
Egypt match, while Argentina supporters were allowed to walk through security without the same level of screening. And this is exactly why people keep accusing FIFA of double standards.

item.title: This piece is one of my favorite paintings, it was also one …
item.author: Maryanne Chisholm 🌊 💙 (@maryannechisholm.bsky.social)
item.description:
This piece is one of my favorite paintings, it was also one of the most laborious. I loved the attention to detail that Klimt used to do, he inspired me. For my fine art prints and more:

fineartamerica.com/featured/the...
item.content:encoded:
This piece is one of my favorite paintings, it was also one of the most laborious. I loved the attention to detail that Klimt used to do, he inspired me. For my fine art prints and more:
